subcodes.first_line: O thou intimate companion of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Remember thou those days when, in the luminous Shrine, we were companions and associates, engaged in remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس عبدالبهاء یاد باد ایامی که در بقعه نوراء همدم و همنشین بودیم و بذکر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @personal instructions, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
